keyFeatures.en: Merge multiple PDF files into one
Split PDF files into multiple pages or sections
keyFeatures.zh: 将PDF文件拆分成多页或部分

description.zh: 基本功能，适用于个人使用

weaknesses.en: Limited to personal use and lacks commercial options
weaknesses.zh: 仅限个人使用且缺乏商业选项

targetAudience.en: Individuals and small businesses for personal projects
targetAudience.zh: 个人和小型企业用于个人项目

positioning.en: Simple and free tool for basic PDF file manipulation
positioning.zh: 一个简单且免费的基本PDF文件操作工具
